name: briefcase
description: Briefcase - Professional media library manager with AI analysis

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:electron
scripts.install:electron: cd electron && [ -f package.json ] && npm install || echo 'No electron/package.json found, skipping...'
scripts.verify:deps: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const paths = ['backend/node_modules', 'backend/node_modules/@types/uuid', 'backend/node_modules/@types/express']; paths.forEach(p => { if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { console.error('Missing:', p); process.exit(1); }}); console.log('✓ All backend dependencies verified');"
scripts.clean:linux: rimraf dist-electron/linux-unpacked dist-electron/*.AppImage dist-electron/*.AppImage.blockmap dist-electron/*.deb dist-electron/latest-linux.yml
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:mac && npm run clean:win && npm run clean:linux && rimraf dist-electron backup
scripts.prebuild:all: npm run verify:deps || npm run install:backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && npm run build:preload
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install --prefer-offline && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist/main.js')||!fs.existsSync('dist/app.module.js')){console.error('Backend build incomplete: dist/main.js or dist/app.module.js missing — aborting');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build:backend:fast: cd backend && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist/main.js')||!fs.existsSync('dist/app.module.js')){console.error('Backend build incomplete: dist/main.js or dist/app.module.js missing — aborting');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build:fast: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend:fast && npm run build:frontend:dev && npm run build:electron && npm run build:preload
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run dev:build && npm run electron:dev
scripts.dev:build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && npm run build:preload
scripts.electron:dev: npm run dev:build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.electron:test-packaged: npm run build:all && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.package:mac: npm run clean:mac && npm run install:ffmpeg:x64 && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && npm run package:mac:electron-arm64:unsigned && npm run package:mac:electron-x64:unsigned
scripts.package:mac:signed: npm run clean:mac && npm run install:ffmpeg:x64 && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && npm run package:mac:electron-arm64 && npm run package:mac:electron-x64
scripts.package:mac:fast: npm run install:ffmpeg:x64 && npm run build:fast && npm run package:backend:prod && npm run package:mac:electron-arm64:unsigned && npm run package:mac:electron-x64:unsigned
scripts.publish:mac: npm run version:bump && npm run clean:mac && npm run install:ffmpeg:x64 && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && npm run publish:mac:electron-arm64 && npm run publish:mac:electron-x64 && node scripts/publish-app.js --mac
scripts.package:mac-arm64: npm run clean:mac && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac-arm64:fast: npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.binaries:build: node scripts/package-binaries.js && node scripts/package-llama-extra.js && node scripts/add-whisper-models-to-manifest.js
scripts.package:mac-x64: npm run clean:mac && npm run install:ffmpeg:x64 && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac-x64:fast: npm run install:ffmpeg:x64 && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:win-x64: npm run clean:win && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.publish:win-x64: npm run version:bump && npm run clean:win && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always && node scripts/publish-app.js --win
scripts.package:win-x64:fast: npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:win-arm64: npm run clean:win && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:win-arm64:fast: npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:linux: npm run clean:linux && npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.package:linux:fast: npm run build:all && npm run package:backend:prod && electron-builder --linux --publish never

author: Your Name
